DISCOVERY 610, TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS MODIFIED. PLAINTIFF GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER THAT THE GENUINENESS OF DOCUMENTS AND TRUTH OF FACTS BE ADMITTED AND COMPELLING RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $527.50 TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. Off Calendar May-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Wayne Collins, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Neftaly Candelario Rivera

No other appearance stated, tentative ruling is adopted as modified. PLAINTIFF GEORGE BALLARD COMPANY's Motion For Order That The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And Compelling Responses To Interrogatories And Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $527.50 to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
